description: Cross-cutting V1 product contract, scope matrix, capability documentation, and rollout framing for the Web Annotations plugin.

userStories.title: Record Web Annotations V1 scope decisions
userStories.description: As an engineering lead, I want the Web Annotations V1 scope matrix and execution order recorded so that Ralph iterations implement a consistent product boundary.
acceptanceCriteria: Update the Web Annotations PRD README or change docs with the authoritative V1 scope matrix covering Chat Web entry, CDP-first injection, target kinds, source hints, store, tools, prompt context, privacy, and optional debug CLI scope
Document the recommended Ralph execution order and cross-PRD dependencies
Mark unresolved items as assumptions or TBD only where implementation truly cannot proceed without user input
Do not change runtime behavior in this story

userStories.title: Add Web Annotations capability documentation
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want capability documentation for Web Annotations so that plugin responsibilities and selectable tools are discoverable outside the change folder.
acceptanceCriteria: Add or update a capability document under docs/specs/capabilities for Web Annotations
Document session-scoped annotations, CDP injection, Chat Web attachments, native tools, source hints, security/privacy boundaries, and non-goals
Link the capability document from the Web Annotations PRD README or related change docs

userStories.title: Document optional debug-web annotation discovery
userStories.description: As a CLI user, I want any optional debug-web annotation commands to follow progressive discovery so that the CLI remains agent-friendly.
acceptanceCriteria: If annotation CLI helpers are included, document the intended pibo debug web discovery flow without duplicating long implementation details at every help level
Document that CLI helpers reuse the Web Annotation store and do not form a separate tool silo
If CLI helpers are deferred, record that decision in the PRD README or change docs

userStories.title: Add Web Annotations rollout checklist
userStories.description: As an operator, I want a rollout checklist so that Web Annotations is validated in Docker and dev before production deployment.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a rollout checklist to the PRD docs or a dedicated project doc
Checklist covers typecheck, unit tests, Chat Web checks, browser/CDP validation, owner-scope isolation, payload bounds, redaction, dev deployment, and production approval
Checklist states that Chrome Extension support and automatic code edits are out of scope for V1
